task_completion.description: Configure KSP plugin and Room dependencies in the Gradle build files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the project's build.gradle or build.gradle.kts files with the KSP plugin (id 'com.google.devtools.ksp' version '1.9.22-1.0.17') and Room dependencies (version '2.6.1' for runtime, ktx, and ksp compiler).

task_completion.description: Create the Task entity with the required fields and annotations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing Task.kt open in the editor with the @Entity annotation. It must include an @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Int, title: String, description: String? (nullable), isCompleted: Boolean = false, and createdAt: Long.

task_completion.description: Create the TaskDao interface with the required database operations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing TaskDao.kt open in the editor with the @Dao annotation. It must include methods for @Insert, @Update, @Delete, a @Query to retrieve all tasks ordered by createdAt DESC, a @Query to retrieve a task by ID, and a @Query to delete all tasks.

task_completion.description: Create the AppDatabase class extending RoomDatabase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing AppDatabase.kt open in the editor with the @Database annotation including the Task entity. The class must be abstract, extend RoomDatabase, and contain an abstract function returning TaskDao.

task_completion.description: The project builds successfully after adding the Room database components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Android Studio Build tool window or a terminal output displaying 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' or a green checkmark indicating that the Gradle build completed without errors.

integrity.description: The agent used an IDE or proper text editor to modify the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Android Studio, IntelliJ, VSCode, or a terminal-based editor (like nano/vim) being used to edit the Kotlin and Gradle files, rather than just echoing text directly into files without opening them.

integrity.description: The files were created in the correct package directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The IDE project explorer, file tabs, or terminal paths show that Task.kt, TaskDao.kt, and AppDatabase.kt are located in app/src/main/java/com/example/tasktracker/data/.

integrity.description: The build success message is from a genuine Gradle execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output appears in the standard Android Studio Build window or from a legitimate './gradlew build' terminal command, not from a mocked text file or simple echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TaskTracker. The data package directory is app/src/main/java/com/example/tasktracker/data. Room version must be exactly 2.6.1 and KSP version must be exactly 1.9.22-1.0.17. Required files to be created are Task.kt, TaskDao.kt, and AppDatabase.kt.
